Interface View

All Known Implementing Classes:
TextUserInterface
public interface View
Interface defining the contract for all user interface implementations in the events app.

The View provides methods for displaying information to the user and collecting input. This abstraction enables the system to support different UI implementations (e.g., text-based, graphical) while keeping the controllers decoupled from specific UI technology.
